ship.releaseNotes:
### Main APP + startup bundle with pre-build engines, optimized for AMPERE, ADA and BLACKWELL architectures.
>Includes GGML Llama.cpp + Tom TQ
>CUDA 13.3 (Frontier) + 12.8 (Stable)
>built on VS2026 + VS2022
ship.appOnlyReleaseNotes:
### App-Only update (`App-Only Setup`)

Lightweight installer — **UI, bug fixes, and provider template JSONs** only.

**Choose this if you already have:**
- A **Full Bundle** install from a prior release, or
- Engine binaries you built with **Foundry** (1-click CMake build in the app)

**Does not include** pre-built CUDA engines. Existing `runtime/` engines are preserved on in-place upgrade.

**First install?** Use the **Full Bundle** installer — or download it from the in-app updater after onboarding.
ship.fullBundleReleaseNotes:
### Full Bundle (`Setup` — complete NSIS)

Complete installer — **app + provider templates + pre-built CUDA engines** (Frontier + Stable for GGML Master and Tom TQ).

**Choose this if you:**
- Are installing for the **first time**
- Only have a standalone exe and need working engines
- Want refreshed pre-built engines without running Foundry

Optimized for Ampere, Ada, and Blackwell. CUDA 13.3 (Frontier) + 12.8 (Stable).

**Only need UI/features?** Use the faster **App-Only** release when available.
